name: koan
description: Institutional knowledge capture & memory for law firms — a skills-only Claude plugin over plain local markdown, with an optional MCP server for semantic search.

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:mcp
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run build:core && node --test "packages/core/test/*.test.mjs"
scripts.pack:plugin: npm run check && rm -f koan-plugin.zip && cd plugin && zip -r -X ../koan-plugin.zip . -x '*.DS_Store'
